emotional_tone: Cinematic, elite athleticism, high-energy, premium coaching.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Give it a bold, aggressive athletic feel.

body.usage: Use for readable paragraphs, descriptions, and UI labels.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16. Containers must have internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Tetris' or 'Bento' style asymmetry for feature showcases.
spacing_and_layout.hero: Full height (min-h-[80vh]). Overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E6BFF] text-white hover:bg-[#1E6BFF]/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none

cards.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#262626] rounded-none p-6 md:p-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#1E6BFF]/50
cards.premium_pricing: bg-[#141414] border-2 border-[#1E6BFF] relative overflow-hidden ring-4 ring-[#1E6BFF]/20

motion_and_interaction.hover: High-contrast hover states. Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and gain subtle blue border.
motion_and_interaction.buttons: Scale up slightly (scale-105) on hover, active state scales down (scale-95).
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeleton screens matching card background (#141414).

hero.usage: Landing page background. Apply heavy dark gradient overlay from left.

courses.usage: Course library thumbnail or feature highlight.

video_analysis.usage: Showcase for the AI video technique analysis feature.

premium.name: Premium Plan
features: AI Spot Recommender (Based on weight, gear, wind, level)

dashboard.video_analysis_mock: Allow video upload. Mock an AI feedback response highlighting stance, pop, or landing.
dashboard.spot_recommender_ui: Form with inputs: User Weight (kg), Board/Kite Size, Skill Level (Beginner/Intermediate/Pro), Target Date. Output: Suggested spot with wind conditions.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #1E6BFF has >4.5:1 contrast. Adjust blue if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use heavily customized Shadcn components for Dashboard and interactive elements.
Avoid border-radius (use rounded-none or rounded-sm max) to maintain the brutalist/pro-sport aesthetic.
Integrate Google OAuth via Emergent Auth for login.
Build the Spot Recommender as a premium-gated feature. Show a lock icon or redirect to upgrade for Standard users.
Ensure the hero image uses a gradient mask so the pure white text is perfectly legible.
Use the specific brand logo provided.
Do not use generic SaaS template designs. Stick strictly to the dark/cinematic 'Performance Pro' archetype.
